Interface ByteType

All Superinterfaces:
Mirror, PrimitiveType, Type
public interface ByteType extends PrimitiveType
The type of all primitive byte values accessed in the target VM. Calls to Value.type() will return an implementor of this interface.
Since:
1.3
See Also:
  • ByteValue

  • Method Summary

    toString, virtualMachine
    Modifier and Type
    Method

    String
    toString()

    signature()
